title: 방탄커피, 제대로 알고 마시자
text_preview: 커피에 버터를 넣는다고요? 이상하게 들리죠.
image_prompt: A close-up, shallow depth of field shot of a hand gently dropping a small, golden cube of grass-fed butter into a steaming black coffee in a minimalist ceramic mug. The butter creates a subtle ripple on the dark surface. Dramatic, warm backlighting highlights the steam rising from the coffee and the texture of the butter. The setting is a clean, modern kitchen counter. Intriguing atmosphere, shot on ARRI Alexa, 8K ultra HD, tall portrait, vertical, photorealistic, cinematic film still, 8K, no text overlay

title: 방탄커피, 제대로 알고 마시자
text_preview: 그런데 이게 전 세계 수백만 명이 아침마다 마시는 음료입니다. 바로 방탄커피.
image_prompt: A confident, well-dressed person in their 30s sips a creamy bulletproof coffee from a stylish mug, a subtle smile on their face. The setting is a sunlit, modern kitchen with a large window in the background, hinting at a bustling city morning. Bright, natural morning light bathes the scene, creating soft highlights on the mug and the person's face. Shallow depth of field, shot on ARRI Alexa, 8K ultra HD, tall portrait, vertical, photorealistic, cinematic film still, 8K, no text overlay

title: 방탄커피란?
text_preview: 방탄커피는 블랙커피에 무염 버터와 MCT 오일을 섞어 만든 고지방 음료입니다.
image_prompt: An overhead shot on a clean, light-colored kitchen counter, showing a freshly brewed black coffee in a clear glass mug, a block of unsalted grass-fed butter next to it, and a small bottle of MCT oil with a spoon. The ingredients are neatly arranged, ready to be combined. Soft, even studio lighting illuminates the scene, emphasizing the textures and clarity of each component. Shallow depth of field, shot on ARRI Alexa, 8K ultra HD, tall portrait, vertical, photorealistic, cinematic film still, 8K, no text overlay

title: 방탄커피란?
text_preview: 미국의 데이브 아스프리가 티베트 여행 중 현지인들이 마시던 버터차에서 영감을 받아 만들었죠.
image_prompt: A Western traveler, dressed in practical outdoor gear, observes with curiosity as a group of Tibetan locals, in traditional attire, huddle around a fire, sharing cups of steaming butter tea in a rustic, dimly lit tent or home. The interior is filled with warm, natural light filtering through an opening and the soft glow of a fire, creating a sense of ancient tradition and cultural exchange. Shallow depth of field, shot on ARRI Alexa, 8K ultra HD, tall portrait, vertical, photorealistic, cinematic film still, 8K, no text overlay

title: 왜 마실까?
text_preview: 첫째, 포만감이 오래 갑니다. 건강한 지방이 혈당을 안정시켜서 점심까지 배고프지 않아요.
image_prompt: A focused professional in their 30s, looking alert and content, works diligently at a clean, modern desk in a bright office. A half-empty mug of bulletproof coffee sits nearby. The morning sun streams through a large window, illuminating their face with soft, natural light, conveying a sense of sustained energy and lack of hunger. Shallow depth of field, shot on ARRI Alexa, 8K ultra HD, tall portrait, vertical, photorealistic, cinematic film still, 8K, no text overlay

title: 왜 마실까?
text_preview: 둘째, 집중력이 올라갑니다. MCT 오일이 빠르게 에너지로 전환되면서 뇌에 연료를 공급하거든요.
image_prompt: A close-up shot of a person's face, their eyes intently focused on a screen or book, a subtle furrow in their brow indicating deep concentration. A soft, dramatic spotlight illuminates their forehead and eyes, symbolizing mental clarity and heightened focus. The background is blurred, suggesting a quiet, undistracting environment. Shallow depth of field, shot on ARRI Alexa, 8K ultra HD, tall portrait, vertical, photorealistic, cinematic film still, 8K, no text overlay

title: 왜 마실까?
text_preview: 셋째, 저탄고지 다이어트와 찰떡궁합입니다.
image_prompt: An aesthetically arranged low-carb, high-fat breakfast spread on a rustic wooden table. A creamy bulletproof coffee in a stylish mug is prominently featured alongside a plate of avocado, eggs, and leafy greens. Bright, natural daylight from a nearby window bathes the scene, creating a fresh and healthy atmosphere. Shallow depth of field, shot on ARRI Alexa, 8K ultra HD, tall portrait, vertical, photorealistic, cinematic film still, 8K, no text overlay

title: 만드는 방법
text_preview: 재료는 딱 세 가지. 갓 내린 뜨거운 블랙커피 한 잔, 무염 그래스페드 버터 열 그램에서 십오 그램, 그리고 MCT 오일 한 스푼입니다.
image_prompt: A pristine overhead shot of the three key ingredients for bulletproof coffee, meticulously arranged on a smooth, light-colored surface. A steaming mug of freshly brewed black coffee, a precisely cut 10-15 gram block of unsalted grass-fed butter, and a tablespoon of MCT oil are the focus. Soft, even lighting highlights the details of each component, creating a clean, instructional aesthetic. Shallow depth of field, shot on ARRI Alexa, 8K ultra HD, tall portrait, vertical, photorealistic, cinematic film still, 8K, no text overlay

title: 만드는 방법
text_preview: 만드는 순서도 간단합니다. 먼저 원두를 갈아서 뜨거운 커피를 내려주세요.
image_prompt: A close-up shot of hands operating a manual coffee grinder, fresh coffee beans being crushed into grounds. In the background, a pour-over coffee maker slowly drips hot water over coffee grounds into a mug. Warm, inviting morning light streams in from a window, creating a serene and artisanal atmosphere. Shallow depth of field, shot on ARRI Alexa, 8K ultra HD, tall portrait, vertical, photorealistic, cinematic film still, 8K, no text overlay

title: 만드는 방법
text_preview: 드립이든 프렌치프레스든 상관없습니다.
image_prompt: A clear, eye-level shot showcasing both a modern pour-over drip coffee maker and a classic French press, side-by-side on a clean kitchen counter. Both appear freshly used or ready for brewing. Bright, even lighting illuminates the metallic and glass textures, emphasizing the versatility of brewing methods. Shallow depth of field, shot on ARRI Alexa, 8K ultra HD, tall portrait, vertical, photorealistic, cinematic film still, 8K, no text overlay

title: 만드는 방법
text_preview: 인스턴트는 피하는 게 좋아요. 다음으로 뜨거운 커피에 무염 버터와 MCT 오일을 넣어주세요.
image_prompt: A close-up shot of a hand carefully adding a cube of unsalted butter and then a spoonful of MCT oil into a steaming mug of freshly brewed hot black coffee. The ingredients gently fall into the dark liquid, creating subtle ripples. Bright, focused lighting highlights the textures and the steam, emphasizing the precision of the process. The setting is a clean kitchen counter. Shallow depth of field, shot on ARRI Alexa, 8K ultra HD, tall portrait, vertical, photorealistic, cinematic film still, 8K, no text overlay

title: 만드는 방법
text_preview: 여기서 핵심 포인트! 반드시 그래스페드 버터를 쓰세요.
image_prompt: An extreme close-up, low-angle shot of a premium package of "Grass-Fed Butter," its label clearly visible and emphasized. The butter appears rich and golden, perhaps with a slight texture. Dramatic, focused lighting creates strong highlights and shadows, giving the product an important, almost revered quality on a rustic wooden kitchen counter. Shallow depth of field, shot on ARRI Alexa, 8K ultra HD, tall portrait, vertical, photorealistic, cinematic film still, 8K, no text overlay

title: 만드는 방법
text_preview: 일반 버터와 영양 성분이 다릅니다. 오메가3와 비타민K2가 풍부하거든요.
image_prompt: A side-by-side comparison shot on a clean, neutral surface. On the left, a block of 'regular' butter (pale yellow) in simple packaging. On the right, a richer, deeper golden block of 'grass-fed' butter in more premium packaging, subtly illuminated to emphasize its superior quality. Clear, analytical lighting highlights the subtle differences in color and texture, conveying an informative and discerning atmosphere. Shallow depth of field, shot on ARRI Alexa, 8K ultra HD, tall portrait, vertical, photorealistic, cinematic film still, 8K, no text overlay

title: 만드는 방법
text_preview: 마지막으로 블렌더로 이십 초간 강하게 섞어주세요.
image_prompt: A dynamic mid-shot of a powerful blender vigorously mixing the ingredients for bulletproof coffee. The liquids inside are swirling rapidly, transforming into a creamy, frothy mixture. Dramatic, focused lighting catches the movement and texture within the blender carafe, creating an energetic and transformative atmosphere in a modern kitchen. Shallow depth of field, shot on ARRI Alexa, 8K ultra HD, tall portrait, vertical, photorealistic, cinematic film still, 8K, no text overlay

title: 만드는 방법
text_preview: 숟가락으로 젓는 건 안 됩니다. 블렌더로 유화시켜야 크리미한 라떼처럼 부드러워져요. 위에 거품이 생기면 성공입니다.
image_prompt: A close-up, slightly overhead shot of a perfectly frothed, creamy bulletproof coffee in an elegant ceramic mug, topped with a thick layer of silky foam. A lonely, unused spoon rests on a saucer beside the mug, emphasizing the need for a blender. Soft, inviting light from a window highlights the luxurious texture of the foam, creating a satisfying and successful atmosphere in a cozy kitchen. Shallow depth of field, shot on ARRI Alexa, 8K ultra HD, tall portrait, vertical, photorealistic, cinematic film still, 8K, no text overlay

title: 주의할 점
text_preview: 하나, 공복에 마시세요. 다른 음식과 함께 먹으면 칼로리가 과해집니다.
image_prompt: A single, elegant mug of bulletproof coffee sits prominently on a clean, uncluttered dining table, bathed in soft, early morning light. The table is otherwise completely empty, emphasizing that it should be consumed alone. The serene and quiet atmosphere conveys a sense of disciplined, mindful consumption. Shallow depth of field, shot on ARRI Alexa, 8K ultra HD, tall portrait, vertical, photorealistic, cinematic film still, 8K, no text overlay

title: 주의할 점
text_preview: 둘, 하루 한 잔만 드세요. 버터 커피도 칼로리가 이백에서 삼백 킬로칼로리나 됩니다.
image_prompt: A close-up shot of a single, steaming mug of bulletproof coffee centered on a minimalist wooden coaster. The background is softly blurred, possibly hinting at a morning scene. Clear, balanced lighting illuminates the mug, emphasizing the idea of a singular, measured portion for the day. Shallow depth of field, shot on ARRI Alexa, 8K ultra HD, tall portrait, vertical, photorealistic, cinematic film still, 8K, no text overlay

title: 주의할 점
text_preview: 셋, 콜레스테롤 수치가 높은 분은 의사와 상담 후 드시길 권합니다.
image_prompt: A mid-shot of a concerned patient in their 50s listening attentively as a professional, empathetic doctor, wearing a white coat, discusses health advice in a clean, modern medical office. The doctor gestures gently, and the patient's expression shows thoughtful consideration. Professional, slightly cool lighting emphasizes the serious and advisory atmosphere. Shallow depth of field, shot on ARRI Alexa, 8K ultra HD, tall portrait, vertical, photorealistic, cinematic film still, 8K, no text overlay

title: 주의할 점
text_preview: 내일 아침, 커피 한 잔에 버터 한 조각.
image_prompt: A close-up shot of a clean, empty coffee mug and a small, fresh cube of butter placed neatly on a saucer, positioned on a windowsill. Soft, promising dawn light streams through the window, hinting at a new morning and a fresh start. The atmosphere is anticipatory, simple, and inviting. Shallow depth of field, shot on ARRI Alexa, 8K ultra HD, tall portrait, vertical, photorealistic, cinematic film still, 8K, no text overlay

title: 주의할 점
text_preview: 한번 도전해보세요. 더 많은 건강 꿀팁은 이 채널에서 만나요!
image_prompt: A dynamic mid-shot of a person's hand confidently reaching for a steaming mug of bulletproof coffee on a brightly lit kitchen counter, ready to take a first sip. Their face, slightly out of frame but suggested, conveys determination and excitement for a new health journey. Uplifting, positive natural light fills the scene, creating an encouraging and empowering atmosphere. Shallow depth of field, shot on ARRI Alexa, 8K ultra HD, tall portrait, vertical, photorealistic, cinematic film still, 8K, no text overlay
